---
title: "LLM Radar"
format:
  dashboard:
    theme: [cosmo, custom.scss]
    nav-buttons:
      - icon: github
        href: https://github.com/ronaldmego/llm-radar
jupyter: python3
---

```{python}
#| echo: false
#| output: false
import sys
sys.path.insert(0, "src")
import numpy as np
from api_client import OpenRouterClient
from data_processor import process_models, summary_stats
from hf_client import HuggingFaceClient, process_hf_models, hf_summary_stats
from visualizations import (
    newest_table,
    cheapest_capable_table,
    hf_most_downloaded_table,
    hf_most_liked_table,
)

# Hosted / commercial side — OpenRouter
df = process_models(OpenRouterClient().get_models())
stats = summary_stats(df)

# Open-weights side — Hugging Face
hf_df = process_hf_models(HuggingFaceClient().get_models())
hf_stats = hf_summary_stats(hf_df)

# Fetch/render timestamp for the source-and-freshness footers (veracity).
from datetime import datetime, timezone
updated = datetime.now(timezone.utc).strftime("%Y-%m-%d %H:%M UTC")
```

# Hosted

## Row {height=24%}

```{python}
#| content: valuebox
#| title: "Models tracked"
dict(value=stats["total_models"], icon="boxes", color="#1f3a5f")
```

```{python}
#| content: valuebox
#| title: "Providers"
dict(value=stats["providers"], icon="building", color="#2563a8")
```

```{python}
#| content: valuebox
#| title: "New this week"
dict(value=stats["new_this_week"], icon="stars", color="#a8482b")
```

```{python}
#| content: valuebox
#| title: "Biggest context"
dict(value=f'{stats["max_context_k"]:,}K', icon="arrows-angle-expand", color="#15803d")
```

```{python}
#| content: valuebox
#| title: "Free models"
dict(value=stats["free_models"], icon="gift", color="#16202e")
```

## Row {height=68%}

### Column {.tabset}

```{python}
#| title: Newest
#| echo: false
newest_table(df)
```

```{python}
#| title: Cheapest capable
#| echo: false
cheapest_capable_table(df)
```

::: {.card title="Full catalog — search & sort"}

```{python}
#| echo: false
#| output: false
cols = ["name", "provider", "context_k", "price_in", "price_out", "modalities", "created_str"]
records = df[cols].replace({np.nan: None}).to_dict("records")
ojs_define(models=records)
```

```{ojs}
//| echo: false
viewof q = Inputs.search(models, { placeholder: `Search ${models.length} models…` })
```

```{ojs}
//| echo: false
Inputs.table(q, {
  columns: ["name", "provider", "context_k", "price_in", "price_out", "modalities", "created_str"],
  header: {
    name: "Model", provider: "Provider", context_k: "Context (K)",
    price_in: "$/1M in", price_out: "$/1M out", modalities: "Modalities", created_str: "Added"
  },
  sort: "created_str",
  reverse: true,
  rows: 20,
  layout: "auto"
})
```

:::

## Row {height=8%}

```{python}
#| echo: false
#| output: asis
print(
    "**Source:** OpenRouter `/api/v1/models` (public, no auth) — "
    "[open the raw JSON](https://openrouter.ai/api/v1/models) · "
    f"**Data as of:** {updated} · "
    "**Code:** [github.com/ronaldmego/llm-radar](https://github.com/ronaldmego/llm-radar)"
)
```

# Open-weights

## Row {height=24%}

```{python}
#| content: valuebox
#| title: "Open LLMs"
dict(value=hf_stats["tracked"], icon="boxes", color="#1f3a5f")
```

```{python}
#| content: valuebox
#| title: "Permissive license"
dict(value=f'{hf_stats["permissive_pct"]}%', icon="unlock", color="#15803d")
```

```{python}
#| content: valuebox
#| title: "Gated models"
dict(value=hf_stats["gated"], icon="lock", color="#a8482b")
```

```{python}
#| content: valuebox
#| title: "Orgs"
dict(value=hf_stats["orgs"], icon="building", color="#2563a8")
```

```{python}
#| content: valuebox
#| title: "New this week"
dict(value=hf_stats["new_this_week"], icon="stars", color="#16202e")
```

## Row {height=68%}

### Column {.tabset}

```{python}
#| title: Most downloaded
#| echo: false
hf_most_downloaded_table(hf_df)
```

```{python}
#| title: Community favorites
#| echo: false
hf_most_liked_table(hf_df)
```

::: {.card title="Open-weights catalog — search & sort"}

```{python}
#| echo: false
#| output: false
hf_cols = ["name", "org", "downloads", "likes", "license", "task", "created_str"]
hf_records = hf_df[hf_cols].replace({np.nan: None}).to_dict("records")
ojs_define(hf_models=hf_records)
```

```{ojs}
//| echo: false
viewof hfq = Inputs.search(hf_models, { placeholder: `Search ${hf_models.length} open models…` })
```

```{ojs}
//| echo: false
Inputs.table(hfq, {
  columns: ["name", "org", "downloads", "likes", "license", "task", "created_str"],
  header: {
    name: "Model", org: "Org", downloads: "Downloads 30d", likes: "Likes",
    license: "License", task: "Task", created_str: "Added"
  },
  format: {
    downloads: x => x >= 1e6 ? (x/1e6).toFixed(1) + "M" : x >= 1e3 ? (x/1e3).toFixed(0) + "k" : x
  },
  sort: "downloads",
  reverse: true,
  rows: 20,
  layout: "auto"
})
```

:::

## Row {height=8%}

```{python}
#| echo: false
#| output: asis
print(
    "**Source:** Hugging Face Hub `/api/models?pipeline_tag=text-generation&sort=downloads` "
    "(public, no auth) — "
    "[open the raw JSON](https://huggingface.co/api/models?pipeline_tag=text-generation&sort=downloads&direction=-1&limit=5) · "
    f"**Data as of:** {updated} · "
    "**Code:** [github.com/ronaldmego/llm-radar](https://github.com/ronaldmego/llm-radar)"
)
```
